description: The Highwaymen Motorcycle Club is a one-percenter outlaw motorcycle club founded in Detroit, Michigan in 1954. It is the largest motorcycle club in the Detroit area with over 400 members and chapters in several U.S. states. The club has been the subject of major FBI investigations in 1973, 1987, and 2007, resulting in convictions for racketeering, drug trafficking, and other crimes. Despite its outlaw status, the group has recently shown affinity for law enforcement.

country_links.evidence_quote: chapters in Alabama, Florida, Indiana, Kentucky, Missouri, Ohio, and Tennessee
country_links.context: The Highwaymen Motorcycle Club has chapters in multiple U.S. states and operates criminal activities there.
